title: ferray-io: no f16/bf16 support in .npy I/O
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

ferray-core supports f16 and bf16 via the half crate, but the NpyElement trait is not implemented for half::f16 or half::bf16. NumPy's .npy format supports float16 (descriptor 'f2') and bfloat16 via ml_dtypes. Loading a float16 .npy file will fail. dtype_parse.rs doesn't map 'f2' to DType::F16. Add NpyElement impls and dtype parsing for f16 (behind the f16 feature flag) and bf16.
